project.description: HRMS Build Job - Compiles code and builds Docker image

hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.name: PUSH_TO_REGISTRY
hudson.model.BooleanParameterDefinition.description: Push built image to Docker registry

hudson.tasks.Shell.command:
#!/bin/bash set -e
echo "======================================" echo "HRMS Build Job" echo "======================================" echo "Branch: ${GIT_BRANCH}" echo "Build Number: ${BUILD_NUMBER}" echo ""
# Export variables export IMAGE_NAME="hrms-app" export IMAGE_TAG="${BUILD_NUMBER}" export GIT_COMMIT_SHORT=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD) export GIT_BRANCH=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD)
echo "Git Commit: ${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT}" echo "Building image: ${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}" echo ""
# Lint PHP code echo "Step 1: Linting PHP code..." docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/app -w /app php:8.2-cli \ sh -c "find . -name '*.php' -not -path './vendor/*' -print0 | xargs -0 -n1 php -l" || echo "PHP linting completed"
# Build Docker image echo "" echo "Step 2: Building Docker image..." docker build \ --tag ${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG} \ --tag ${IMAGE_NAME}:latest \ --label "build.number=${BUILD_NUMBER}" \ --label "git.commit=${GIT_COMMIT_SHORT}" \ --label "git.branch=${GIT_BRANCH}" \ .
echo "" echo "Step 3: Verifying image..." docker images | grep "hrms-app" | head -5
echo "" echo "======================================" echo "Build completed successfully!" echo "Image: ${IMAGE_NAME}:${IMAGE_TAG}" echo "======================================"
